title: Third-party plugins
description: Third-party plugins to install via each platform's native plugin system. Plugins with structured claude fields (marketplace_ref + plugin_id) are auto-installed by install.py; others are managed manually.

platforms.description: Keys are platform names: claude, codex, cursor.

marketplace_ref.description: Claude marketplace source (GitHub repo or URL). Presence of this + plugin_id triggers auto-install by install.py.

plugin_id.description: Claude plugin identifier in plugin@marketplace form. Presence of this + marketplace_ref triggers auto-install by install.py.

install_cmd.description: Human-readable install/management note. For non-auto-installable platforms (codex/cursor) or manually-managed plugins.
